creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just to gather more data.
How did you update the gnome libraries?  Just using portmaster or
similar, or did you recompile everything, including webkit and xombrero?
 Can you recompile webkit and xombrero?
I'll look into this in more detail once my testing environment is up to
speed.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
